description: This source file is part of a backend service for document comparison and gap analysis, specifically related to generating sections of a Primary Master Document (PMD) using language model (LLM) prompts based on matched summaries and templates.

methods.name: str _build_prompt(*, template_title: str, matched_summaries: List[str])
methods.description: Constructs a prompt string for the LLM to generate a PMD section based on the template title and matched summaries.

methods.name: Dict[str,Any] generate_pmd_from_matches( *, llm: LLMProvider, template: List[Dict[str, Any]], matching: Dict[str, Any] )
methods.description: Generates a populated Primary Master Document (PMD) by applying an LLM provider to template sections and their matched summaries, returning the assembled full text with section metadata.

ctags.name: generate_pmd_from_matches
ctags.signature: ( *, llm: LLMProvider, template: List[Dict[str, Any]], matching: Dict[str, Any] )
